  • Module

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    ArriveEvent
    Arrival event for a car.
    Car
    Represents one car in the simulation.
    CarWashEvent
    Base type for car wash events involving a car.
    CarWashState
    Car wash specific simulation state.
    Event
    Base type for all events in the simulator.
    EventQueue
    Simple event list where getNext() returns the earliest event.
    ExponentialRandomStream
    Random number stream with exponentially distributed samples.
    FifoQueue
    Simple FIFO list of cars waiting for service.
    LeaveEvent
    Leave event for a car that completed washing.
    Main
    Entry point for running the lab 6 car wash simulation.
    Observer
    Observer for simulation state updates.
    Simulator
    Generic discrete event-driven simulator.
    StartCarWashSim
    Runs the car wash simulation.
    StartEvent
    Generic start event.
    State
    Shared simulation state.
    StatusView
    Console view of simulation events and cumulative statistics.
    StopEvent
    Stop event that ends the simulation immediately.
    UniformRandomStream
    Random number stream with uniformly distributed samples in a range.
